```python
xs = [10, 5, 0, -5, 10, 20]
max_val = max(xs)
min_val = min(xs)
range_val = max_val - min_val
print("Max value:", max_val)
print("Min value:", min_val)
print("Range calculation:", "max - min")
```

Hint: The range is calculated by subtracting the smallest value from the largest value in the list.
